# removeContact(_:)

**Instance Method**

Removes a host as a contact.

## Declaration

```swift
func removeContact(_ contact: MIDINetworkHost) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **contact**: The host to remove.

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the session successfully removed the host, otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Managing Contacts

- **contacts()**: Returns the array of network hosts.
- **addContact(_:)**: Adds a host as a contact.
- **MIDINetworkNotificationContactsDidChange**: Indicates that the list of contacts changed.
